case_title: FUCHS, HELGE VS CADBURY BEVERAGES INC. C/O GEGELYS, CHRIS

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY FUCHS, HELGE AS TO DEFENDANT CADBURY BEVERAGES INC. C/O GEGELYS, CHRIS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-04-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 08
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
WARNED PLTF:C.M.NOT BINDING OUT OF CA.DON'T HAVE A NY ADDRESS.WILL TRY FOR $5.
CERTIFIED MAIL TO CHRIS GEGELYS C/O CADBURY BEVERAGES, RETURNED SIGNED.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FUCHS, HELGE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CADBURY BEVERAGES INC. C/O GEGELYS, CHRIS STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
